      public GroupConfig()
      Instantiates a new Group config.

    • GroupConfig

      public GroupConfig(String group, List<String> pathsToMatch, List<String> packagesToScan, List<String> packagesToExclude, List<String> pathsToExclude, List<String> producesToMatch, List<String> consumesToMatch, List<String> headersToMatch, String displayName)
      Instantiates a new Group config.
      Parameters:
      group - the group
      pathsToMatch - the paths to match
      packagesToScan - the packages to scan
      packagesToExclude - the packages to exclude
      pathsToExclude - the paths to exclude
      producesToMatch - the produces to match
      consumesToMatch - the consumes to match
      headersToMatch - the headers to match
      displayName - the display name
